providerAuthChoices.choiceLabel: GEIANT Hive with GNS agent identity
providerAuthChoices.groupHint: Cryptographically-signed local AI inference (EU AI Act compliant)
providerAuthChoices.cliDescription: Path to GNS agent identity (default: ~/.config/geiant-hive/identity.json; auto-generated on first run)

hiveJurisdiction.description: H3 cell for jurisdiction binding (e.g., 861e8050fffffff for Rome). Default: auto-detected from IP/timezone.

hiveIdentityPath.description: Path to the agent's Ed25519 identity file. Default: ~/.config/geiant-hive/identity.json. Auto-generated on first run.

hiveMinTrustTier.description: Minimum worker trust tier for inference routing. Default: seedling (accept all workers).
